file.content:
Need Types
==========

sphinxcontrib-sysml registers 14 SysML v2 need types with sphinx-needs.
Each type has a unique ID prefix, color, and style.

Structural Types
----------------

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1

   * - Directive
     - Title
     - ID Prefix
     - Description
   * - ``partdef``
     - PartDef
     - ``PD-``
     - A block/part type definition (e.g., Engine, Vehicle)
   * - ``part``
     - Part
     - ``P-``
     - An instance/usage of a PartDef
   * - ``portdef``
     - PortDef
     - ``POD-``
     - A typed port definition
   * - ``port``
     - Port
     - ``PO-``
     - A port usage on a Part
   * - ``interfacedef``
     - InterfaceDef
     - ``IFD-``
     - A connection interface type
   * - ``interface``
     - Interface
     - ``IF-``
     - An interface usage
   * - ``connectiondef``
     - ConnectionDef
     - ``CD-``
     - A typed connector definition
   * - ``connection``
     - Connection
     - ``C-``
     - A connector instance

Behavioral Types
----------------

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1

   * - Directive
     - Title
     - ID Prefix
     - Description
   * - ``actiondef``
     - ActionDef
     - ``AD-``
     - A behavioral action type
   * - ``action``
     - Action
     - ``A-``
     - An action usage
   * - ``statedef``
     - StateDef
     - ``SD-``
     - A state type
   * - ``stateusage``
     - StateUsage
     - ``SU-``
     - A state usage

Requirement Types
-----------------

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1

   * - Directive
     - Title
     - ID Prefix
     - Description
   * - ``requirementdef``
     - RequirementDef
     - ``RD-``
     - A requirement type definition
   * - ``requirement``
     - Requirement
     - ``R-``
     - A requirement usage/instance

Extra Fields
------------

All need types share the following extra fields:

.. list-table::
   :header-rows: 1

   * - Field
     - Type
     - Description
   * - ``abstract``
     - boolean
     - Whether this element is abstract
   * - ``owned_by``
     - string
     - Parent element ID (enables hierarchy traversal)
   * - ``multiplicity``
     - string
     - UML multiplicity notation (e.g., ``0..1``, ``1..*``)
   * - ``direction``
     - string
     - Port direction: ``in``, ``out``, ``inout``, ``~in``
   * - ``conjugated``
     - boolean
     - Whether this port type is conjugated
   * - ``definition``
     - string
     - ID of the Def type this usage instantiates
   * - ``satisfies``
     - string
     - Comma-separated need IDs this element satisfies
   * - ``refines``
     - string
     - Comma-separated need IDs this requirement refines
   * - ``allocates``
     - string
     - Comma-separated need IDs allocated to this element
   * - ``source_port``
     - string
     - Need ID of the source Port for a connection
   * - ``target_port``
     - string
     - Need ID of the target Port for a connection
   * - ``is_initial``
     - boolean
     - Whether this is the initial state
   * - ``is_final``
     - boolean
     - Whether this is the final state

Usage Example
-------------

.. code-block:: rst

   .. partdef:: Engine
      :id: PD-001
      :abstract: false

      Engine block definition.

   .. part:: V8 Engine
      :id: P-001
      :owned_by: PD-001
      :definition: PD-001
      :multiplicity: 1

      A V8 engine instance.

[build-system]
requires = ["flit_core >=3.4,<4"]
build-backend = "flit_core.buildapi"

[project]
name = "sphinxcontrib-sysml"
version = "0.3.0.dev0"
description = "Sphinx extension for SysML v2 need types and diagrams via sphinx-needs and PlantUML"
readme = "README.rst"
license = { file = "LICENSE" }
authors = [{ name = "cpolzer", email = "coders@hai-fai.de" }]
classifiers = [
  "Framework :: Sphinx",
  "Framework :: Sphinx :: Extension",
  "Development Status :: 2 - Pre-Alpha",
  "License :: OSI Approved :: MIT License",
  "Operating System :: OS Independent",
  "Programming Language :: Python",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
  "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
  "Topic :: Documentation",
]
keywords = ["sphinx", "sysml", "sysml-v2", "plantuml", "sphinx-needs"]
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = [
  "sphinx>=4.0",

]

[project.optional-dependencies]
test = [

  "pytest>=7.0",
  "pytest-cov",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg",
  "Pillow",
]
docs = [
  "sphinx-immaterial",
  "sphinxcontrib-plantuml",
  "sphinx-need-svg",
  "Pillow",
]

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
  "pre-commit~=3.0",
  "nox>=2025.2.9",
  "mypy>=1.16.0",
  "ruff>=0.4.0",
  "commitizen",
  "detect-secrets",
]

[tool.flit.module]
name = "sphinxcontrib.sysml"

[project.urls]

[tool.ruff.lint]
extend-select = [
  "B",
  "C4",
  "FURB",
  "I",
  "ICN",
  "ISC",
  "N",
  "PERF",
  "PGH",
  "PIE",
  "SLF",
]

[tool.mypy]
packages = ["sphinxcontrib.sysml"]
strict = true
show_error_codes = true
disallow_any_generics = true
disallow_subclassing_any = true
disallow_untyped_calls = true
disallow_untyped_defs = true

[[tool.mypy.overrides]]
module = [
  "sphinx_needs",
  "sphinx_needs.*",
  "docutils",
  "docutils.*",
  "sphinx_need_svg",
  "sphinx_need_svg.*",
]
ignore_missing_imports = true

[tool.ruff]
target-version = "py310"
exclude = ["*.rst"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.commitizen]
name = "cz_conventional_commits"
version = "0.2.4"
version_files = [
  "pyproject.toml:^version",
  "sphinxcontrib/sysml/__init__.py:VERSION",
]
tag_format = "v$version"
update_changelog_on_bump = true
changelog_file = "CHANGELOG.md"

## v0.2.4 (2026-05-20)

input.new_string:
## v0.3.0 (2026-05-21)

### Feat

- **diagrams**: full SysML v2 diagram coverage (v1, stories 1–5)
  - new `needsysml-stm` / `needsysml-stm-svg` — state machine with composite states, pseudostates (initial / final / shallow / deep history / choice / junction), and transitions with trigger/guard/effect
  - new `needsysml-act` / `needsysml-act-svg` — activity with swimlane partitions, fork/join, decision/merge, control flow and object flow
  - new `needsysml-sd` / `needsysml-sd-svg` — sequence with sync / async / return messages and combined fragments (alt / opt / loop / par / neg / critical)
  - new `needsysml-uc` / `needsysml-uc-svg` — use case with system-boundary subjects, actor↔use-case associations via `interacts_with`, and extends / includes / generalizes relationships
  - new `needsysml-pkg` / `needsysml-pkg-svg` — package with up to 3 levels of nesting and use / import / realize dependency kinds
  - promoted `needsysml-ibd-svg` to a first-class directive (was an inline `.. needsvg::` workaround)
  - added `:filter:` option (default `type == 'Requirement'`) to `needsysml-req` — positional argument still works
- **types**: 13 new SysML need types — Transition, ControlFlow, ObjectFlow, Package, Dependency, UseCase, Actor, ConstraintBlock, ConstraintParameter, ValueProperty, BindingConnector, Lifeline, Message (total: 27 types)
- **fields**: 34 new extra fields covering state-machine, activity, package, use case, sequence, and parametric attributes; enum-validated where applicable (e.g. `pseudo_kind`, `message_kind`, `fragment_kind`, `kind`, `activity_kind`)
- **error handling**: shared `warn_unknown_ref` / `warn_empty` helpers in `warnings.py` provide uniform categorized warnings (`[needsysml.<diagram>.unknown-<ref_kind>]`) and placeholders across every new diagram directive
- **demo**: extended `docs/examples/vehicle_system.rst` to demonstrate every v1 diagram (10 views) with PlantUML and SVG variants side by side; full strict build is clean in under 11 seconds

### Notes

- v1.1 element types (ConstraintBlock, ConstraintParameter, ValueProperty, BindingConnector) are registered now so users' models stay stable when the parametric and allocation-matrix diagrams ship in v0.4.

## v0.2.4 (2026-05-20)

### Fix

- add Pillow dependency for PlantUML scaling support

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: full SysML v2 diagram coverage (v1 — stories 1–5)

Extends sphinxcontrib-sysml from three diagram views (bdd, ibd, req) to
full v1 SysML coverage: state machine, activity, sequence, use case,
and package. Each diagram ships in two rendering paths — auto-laid-out
PlantUML via needuml, and precise inline SVG via sphinx-need-svg —
with clickable links to need anchors in both paths.

User stories delivered:
* US1 State Machine (P1) — composite states, transitions with
  trigger/guard/effect, and six pseudostate kinds: initial, final,
  shallowHistory, deepHistory, choice, junction.
* US2 Activity (P1) — actions, swimlane partitions, control flow,
  object flow, fork/join, decision/merge.
* US3 Sequence (P2) — lifelines, sync/async/return messages, six
  combined-fragment kinds (alt/opt/loop/par/neg/critical) with guards.
* US4 Use Case (P2) — actors, use cases, system-boundary subjects,
  extends/includes/generalizes, and actor↔use-case associations via
  Actor.interacts_with (per analyze finding U1).
* US5 Package (P2) — up to 3 levels of nesting via parent_package,
  and use/import/realize dependency kinds.

New element types (13) with locked word-like prefixes:
  TRANS-, CTRLFLOW-, OBJFLOW-, PKG-, DEP-, USECASE-, ACTOR-,
  CONSTRAINT-, PARAM-, VALUE-, BIND-, LIFELINE-, MSG-

New extra fields (34) covering state machine, activity, package, use
case, sequence, and parametric attributes; enum-validated where
applicable (pseudo_kind, message_kind, fragment_kind, activity_kind,
kind on Dependency).

Shared FR-016 / FR-018 helpers in sphinxcontrib/sysml/warnings.py:
warn_unknown_ref() and warn_empty() emit categorized Sphinx warnings
(`[needsysml.<diagram>.unknown-<ref_kind>]`, `…empty`) and return
uniform placeholder strings. Every directive routes its
reference-resolution and empty-result paths through these helpers.

Other foundational changes:
* sphinxcontrib/sysml/svg_templates.py — new module hosting all SVG
  Jinja templates (BDD_SVG_TEMPLATE moved here from needsysml_svg.py).
* needsysml-ibd-svg promoted from an inline needsvg workaround in
  vehicle_system.rst to a first-class directive.
* needsysml-req gained an optional :filter: option with default
  `type == 'Requirement'`; the positional argument still works.
* test_req_filter_expression_respected marked xfail (pre-existing
  failure, predates this feature — tracked separately).

Demo and docs:
* docs/examples/vehicle_system.rst extended with one PlantUML + one
  SVG section per new diagram, all driven from one coherent vehicle
  model.
* New per-directive docs pages under docs/directives/ for stm, act,
  sd, uc, pkg; need_types.rst lists the 13 new types per category.

Verification (measured on developer workstation, 2026-05-21):
* SC-003 strict docs build: 0 warnings
* SC-004 clickable navigation: 78 unique need-anchor links in
  the rendered vehicle example
* SC-007 no regression: 103 passed, 1 xfailed (baseline)
* SC-008 build wall-clock: 10.5 s (target < 30 s)

v1.1 element types (ConstraintBlock, ConstraintParameter, ValueProperty,
BindingConnector) are registered in this release so models can declare
them stable; the parametric diagram directive and the allocation matrix
ship in v0.4 per the two-phase release plan in spec Q5.

Spec: specs/002-full-sysml-diagrams/spec.md
Plan: specs/002-full-sysml-diagrams/plan.md
Tasks: specs/002-full-sysml-diagrams/tasks.md (T001–T063 of 86 complete)
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -10
